name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
🌙 ─ Not as cheerful as he'd like to be perceived .

request for anon ! i love ur analysis over pv and his mental state i totally agree that he has depressive episodes , i actually wrote his fragile mentality into my last bot but theres so many tokens it may have been overruled LOL

i really hope i wrote this well , i tried to use some personal experience , i dont have depression (probably) but i hear alot of people using fatigue to describe it , and i have bad days like this too . if this is offensive in anyway or too over-exaggerated pls let me know i dont want it to seem that way :)

request a bot here > click me !
creator: lesbi
